description: Medical clinics, dental practices, eye centres, and health facilities

tone.voice: Professional, calm, and reassuring. Like a caring nurse who explains things clearly.

welcome.message: Welcome to our clinic! 🏥 I'm your virtual health assistant. I can help you book appointments, check our services, answer health questions, or connect you with a doctor. How can I help you today?

faqs.question: What are your operating hours?
faqs.answer: We're open Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM to 8:00 PM, and Saturdays 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM. We're closed on Sundays and public holidays. Emergency cases are seen at the nearest hospital.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: We're located at [Your Address], opposite [Landmark]. We're easily accessible by public transport and have parking available for patients.

faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer:
We offer a wide range of medical services:
🩺 General consultation & checkups
💉 Vaccinations & immunizations
🩸 Lab tests & diagnostics
👶 Child health & immunizations
🤰 Antenatal & postnatal care
🦷 Dental services
👁️ Eye checkups & glasses
❤️ Chronic disease management (diabetes, BP)

Which service are you looking for?

faqs.question: How much is a consultation?
faqs.answer:
Our consultation fees:
• General consultation: UGX 30,000
• Dental consultation: UGX 40,000
• Eye checkup: UGX 35,000
• Specialist consultation: from UGX 80,000

NHIF and most insurance schemes are accepted. Please bring your insurance card.

faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept NHIF and most major insurance providers including: AAR, Jubilee, CIC, UAP, GA Insurance, and many more. Please bring your insurance membership card and a valid ID for your visit.

faqs.question: What lab tests do you offer?
faqs.answer:
Our in-house lab offers:
🩸 Blood tests (full hemogram, malaria, typhoid, blood sugar)
🧪 Urine analysis
🔬 Stool analysis
📸 X-ray & ultrasound
💉 COVID-19 & pregnancy tests

Results for most tests are ready within 2 hours.

faqs.question: Do you offer vaccinations?
faqs.answer:
Yes! We offer:
👶 Child immunizations (BCG, Polio, DPT, Measles, etc.)
💉 Adult vaccines (flu, hepatitis B, tetanus)
✈️ Travel vaccines (yellow fever, typhoid, cholera)
🦟 COVID-19 vaccines

Please bring your child's immunization card.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer:
Booking is easy! Just let me know:
1. Which service you need
2. Your preferred date and time
3. Whether you're a new or returning patient

You can also call us directly on [Phone Number].

faqs.question: Do you offer home visits or delivery?
faqs.answer:
Yes! We offer:
🏠 Home doctor visits (within 5km radius)
💊 Medicine delivery to your home
🩸 Home sample collection for lab tests

Additional fees apply for home visits.

faqs.question: What should I do in an emergency?
faqs.answer:
If you have a medical emergency, please:
🚑 Call 911 or 112 immediately
🏥 Go to the nearest hospital emergency room
📞 Or call us on [Emergency Number]

Our clinic handles non-emergency cases. For life-threatening emergencies, please go to a hospital.

questions.question: What service are you looking for?
Are you a new or returning patient?

pricing.response:
Our standard charges:
🩺 General consultation: UGX 30,000
🦷 Dental checkup: UGX 40,000
👁️ Eye test: UGX 35,000
🩸 Malaria test: UGX 15,000
💉 Vaccinations: from UGX 20,000

We accept NHIF and medical insurance. Would you like to book an appointment?

triggers.condition: message contains 'doctor' or 'specialist' or 'talk to doctor' or 'explain'
triggers.description: Customer asks to speak with a medical professional
triggers.message: I'll connect you with a medical professional who can help. Please hold on.
If this is an emergency, please call 911 or go to the nearest hospital immediately. I'll also connect you with our team for guidance.
I want to make sure you get the right help. Let me connect you with a member of our healthcare team.

handoff.fallbackMessage: I didn't quite get that. You can ask me about our services, pricing, booking, or health information. Or type 'doctor' to speak with a medical professional.

fallback.unknownMessage: I didn't quite understand. Could you try asking about our medical services, booking, or pricing? You can also type 'doctor' to speak with a medical professional.
fallback.errorMessage: Sorry about that! Please try again, or call us directly on [Phone Number].
